# Bug Report

Provide a clear description of the issue.

## Reproduction Steps
Include a minimal `.equis` file or code snippet that reproduces the problem.

```equis
// Your code here
```

## Expected Behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
Describe what actually happened (e.g., error messages).
